name: Black Mountain Gold USA Corp.
summary: Black Mountain Gold USA Corp. engages in the exploration and evaluation of mineral properties in the United States. It holds an option to acquire 90% interest in the Mohave gold project that consists of 149 lode claims and 11 mill site claims covering an area of approximately 1,177 hectares located in Mohave County, Arizona. The company was formerly known as Huffington Capital Corp. and changed its name to Black Mountain Gold USA Corp. in January 2021. Black Mountain Gold USA Corp. was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
